goal: Build a Cortex-Franka block-stacking station: Franka wrapped in CortexFranka, register stack obstacles via register_moving_obstacle. Realizes #28 FrankaCortexBlockStacking infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six Cortex-Franka specifics for CP-61:
1) Franka at standard position. Wrapped via setup_cortex_behavior(robot_kind='franka').
2) 3 cubes on conveyor (potential moving obstacles for stacking).
3) register_moving_obstacle adds each cube to robot's runtime obstacle list.
4) StackBin behind robot for block-stacking output.
5) NO setup_pick_place_controller — Cortex uses RmpFlowCortex internally (different controller).
6) Realizes #28 infrastructure. Full scenario also needs custom DfDecider tree (Sprint 4+).
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(3)], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(3)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/StackBin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.2, 0.2, 0.15])

# Cortex framework wrapper
setup_cortex_behavior(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    robot_kind="franka",
    behavior_module="isaacsim.cortex.behaviors.franka.peck_demo",
    obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/StackBin"],
)

# Register cubes as dynamic obstacles for runtime collision avoidance
for i in range(3):
    register_moving_obstacle(
        robot_path="/World/Franka",
        obstacle_path=f"/World/Cube_{i+1}",
    )
extension_notes: CP-61 realizes #28 FrankaCortexBlockStacking infrastructure. Cortex framework wrapper installed; cubes registered as moving obstacles. Form-gate fails (no setup_pick_place_controller — Cortex uses different controller). Full scenario requires DfDecider tree at runtime.
failure_modes: Cortex framework may not be available in stripped Kit builds — setup_cortex_behavior errors gracefully.
register_moving_obstacle just sets metadata attr — runtime polling needs controller integration.
form-gate verifier expects pick-place controller subscription; Cortex doesn't install one. Form-gate FAILS expectedly.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate expected to fail (Cortex doesn't install pick-place controller); build-only verification
